title: King on Horseback
writer: Claude Accursi, Georges Lampin, Denys de La Patellière
actors: Jean Marais, Eleonora Rossi Drago, Nadja Tiller
plot: Henri La Tour, a strolling player, is also a daring adventurer. So, when, after accomplishing a brilliant feat, he is awarded a title by King Louis XV, the Duke of Saint-Sever takes offense at it and challenges Henri to a duel. Ho...
